conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: For our notification system, let's use Twilio for SMS and SendGrid for email. They're the best in class.

conversation.speaker: assistant
conversation.text: Twilio and SendGrid are reliable. I'll integrate both APIs.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: Let's use a single platform. SendGrid has SMS too. Let's use SendGrid for everything.

conversation.speaker: assistant
conversation.text: SendGrid can handle both. I'll migrate the SMS logic.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: We need push notifications for mobile. Let's use Firebase Cloud Messaging. It handles everything.

conversation.speaker: assistant
conversation.text: FCM supports Android, iOS, and web. I'll implement the messaging service.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: We want an all-in-one provider. Let's use OneSignal. It has email, SMS, and push.

conversation.speaker: assistant
conversation.text: OneSignal is simple to use. I'll set up the channels.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: We only need email for now. Let's use SendGrid. It's the most mature. We can add other channels later.

query: What email service is the team using for transactional notifications?
